payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Round wall-mounted analog clock with a scalloped dark wooden frame, white face with black Roman numerals and black hands, glass-covered and slightly blurred; lower-right edge is slightly cropped — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"dark scalloped wooden wall clock","long_description":"Round wall-mounted analog clock with a scalloped dark wooden frame, white face with black Roman numerals and black hands, glass-covered and slightly blurred; lower-right edge is slightly cropped — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["round","scalloped dark wooden frame","white clock face","black Roman numerals","black hour and minute hands","glass-covered","wall-mounted","analog","slightly blurred","edge-cropped lower right"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
